chunks.title: Decree of Darius
chunks.reason: Contains the full text of King Darius's official decree regarding the temple reconstruction.

chunks.title: Completion of the Temple
chunks.reason: Narrates the execution of the decree and the completion of the building project.

chunks.title: Dedication and Feast
chunks.reason: Describes the dedication ceremony, Passover celebration, and Feast of Unleavened Bread.
